title: DBIS | Combined Final Summary
note: Transcribed from photographed pages (Sections 1, 3–9). Section 2 was not among the photos provided. A few system/tool names in the dense reference tables were hard to read in the source photos; cross-check those against the original where accuracy is critical.

sections.title: This is Deutsche Bank
points: Deutsche Bank was founded in 1870 in Berlin as a specialist bank for financing foreign trade and promoting German exports.
The bank has a strong position in Germany and Europe and operates across North America, Asia and key emerging markets.
Deutsche Bank operates through Corporate Bank, Investment Bank, Private Bank and DWS, supported by global operations and delivery capabilities.
The Deutsche Bank logo is a square with a diagonal slash, symbolizing stability and dynamic growth, reliability, progress and unity.
The bank's purpose is to support clients' lasting success and financial security at home and abroad.
The vision is to be the Global Hausbank: the European champion and first choice for clients.
The strategy focuses on a sharpened business model, targeted growth, disciplined resource allocation and excess capital returns over time.
"With deep dedication" captures the bank's long-term client commitment, deep expertise and more than 150 years of experience.
sections.operations_relevance: For DB IS, this purpose means maintaining financial security through accurate data, timely settlement, strong controls, clear escalation and reliable client outcomes.

aspiration_culture.expected_behaviours: Acting responsibly, thinking commercially, taking initiative and working collaboratively.
aspiration_culture.operations_translation: Ownership, quality-first execution, risk awareness, evidence discipline and proactive stakeholder engagement.

sections.title: Securities Market and Investment Banking Basics
points: Securities are tradable financial instruments with economic value, issued by companies or governments to raise capital and traded by investors.

Main securities include equities, debt instruments, derivatives and hybrids. Equities represent ownership, debt represents borrowing, derivatives derive value from an underlying asset, and hybrids combine features.
The Primary Market issues new securities; the Secondary Market enables trading of existing securities and provides liquidity.
Key market participants include issuers, investors, brokers, stock exchanges, custodians, depositories and regulators.
Investment Banking supports capital raising, advisory, risk management, financing, origination and liquidity services.

pillars.meaning: Client-facing activities such as sales, service and advisory.
Risk management, transaction processing and technology oversight.
pillars.role: Connects client activity with controlled execution.

pillars.meaning: Settlement, clearing, confirmations, records, compliance and admin support.

sections.title: Trade Services
points: Trade Services manages the full transaction lifecycle from capture and execution through confirmation, clearing and final settlement.
The team handles trades and non-trades. Trades involve voluntary exchange of value; non-trades include transfers, gifts, inheritance, free-of-payment movements and other instructions.
Core focus areas include instruction accuracy, rejected instruction repair, settlement matching, failed trade resolution, confirmations, regulatory reporting and risk prevention.

processes.key_activities: Manual instructions, PRAF initiation, delivery/receipt, security locks, worthless securities.
processes.systems_notes: EE2, Orinoco, BURT, Message View, CASCADA, XACT.

processes.key_activities: Input/modification of online instructions and reclaims to responsible teams.
processes.systems_notes: DMS, DB Smart, Easyway, Message View, CASCADA, XACT.

processes.key_activities: Investigates missing/mismatched instructions, follows up with counterparties, avoids BUY-IN risk.
processes.systems_notes: DMS, DB Smart, Easyway, XACT, CASCADA.

processes.key_activities: Repairs transactions, cleans rejected confirmations, releases holdings when required.
processes.systems_notes: XACT, Message View, Cascade, EE2, Easyway, Pilot II.

processes.key_activities: Reconciles registered shares and supports voting rights for AGMs.
Changes account, shares, settlement dates, calculates fees and corrects statements.
processes.systems_notes: DMS, DB Smart, FORSS, NOS, COSMOS, XACT.

processes.purpose: Books location transfer, payments and short-position balancing.

processes.key_activities: Validates instructions, callbacks, routes to Fachbereich; critical deadlines.

processes.purpose: Investigates TME/Konto 2 breaks and custodian fees.
processes.key_activities: Break resolution, P&L sheets, Bundesbank reporting, custodian/transaction fees.
processes.systems_notes: Tributum, TLM, XACT, Pilot II, Abacus, FORSS, IPP.

processes.key_activities: Pre/post matching, manual amendments, missing information reclamation and BaFin reporting.

sections.title: Asset Services
points: Asset Services manages corporate action events, shareholder information, client instructions, income processing, reconciliation and FX-related activities.
Corporate actions may be mandatory, mandatory with options or voluntary. They can affect shareholder entitlements, capital structure and investor choices.
Reconciliation ensures that cash, stock, position, trade and corporate action information remains accurate across custodians, brokers, fund managers and internal systems.

areas.key_activities: Voluntary and mandatory-with-option instructions captured in WPM/EE2 before event deadlines.
areas.systems_notes: DMS, DB Smart DSS, EE2, IPP Emerald, RRE, CAWFM.

areas.key_activities: Name, ISIN, holding date and shares disclosed to agents such as Nasdaq, IHS Markit and MUFG.
areas.systems_notes: DMS, COMPES, EE2, CAWFM, Papyrus, CA Neu, Message View.

areas.key_activities: Letters for warrants, convertible bonds and reverse convertible bonds to support client decisions.
areas.systems_notes: DMS, DB Smart DSS, EE2, IPP Emerald, RRE, CAWFM.

areas.key_activities: Skontrierung, FX securing, open trades/positions and closure before impacted trading.
areas.systems_notes: TLM, Jira Burt, Pilot II, CAWFM, Easymatch.

areas.key_activities: Interest, dividend and redemption income; amount paid to clients equals received amount.
areas.systems_notes: Abacus, PBC One Line, DMS, TLM, EE2, Jira Burt.

areas.key_activities: Tax and FX instructions, non-EUR payments and pay-date readiness.
areas.systems_notes: DMS, COMPES, EE2, CAWFM, Papyrus, CA Neu, Message View.

types_of_reconciliation.what_it_compares: Compares cash/securities transactions, positions and balances.
Matches fund manager and broker trade details.
types_of_reconciliation.why_it_matters: Checks security, quantity, price and settlement date.

types_of_reconciliation.what_it_compares: Compares fund manager positions with custodian/broker records.
Compares CA details across custodian/broker/fund manager.
types_of_reconciliation.why_it_matters: Checks type, record date, ex-date and entitlement.

sections.title: Tax Services
points: Tax Services provides end-to-end tax support to German clients eligible for tax reduction or exemption on European and U.S. securities under DTAA and other tax requirements.
The scope includes tax reclaim, tax relief, QI reporting, substitute certificates, compensation tax processing, stock reconciliation and reports processing.
TS2 and TP11 are part of Trade Services but operate under the Tax Services umbrella in the presented framework.

areas.key_points: 11 European countries, 100k–135k annual reclaim forms, five currencies, approx. EUR 15m FX.
areas.systems_notes: Tax Manager, DMS, DB Smart DSS, Tributum, EE2, COSMOS, XACT, TLM, NOS, Orinoco, Tributum.

areas.key_points: Original/replacement annual tax certificates and annual statements for complex transactions.
areas.systems_notes: DB Smart DSS, DMS, EE2 Tool, NOS-Menue.

areas.key_points: US tax forms, withholding, reporting, remittance, reduced withholding and client confidentiality.
areas.systems_notes: NOS-Menue, EE2, Pilot II, FORSS, Rejects, Manager, Abacus.

areas.key_points: Netting, matching, P&L on shares, error/fraction account, Bundesbank reporting.
Security purchase details, cancellations, donation matching, loss compensation and year-end tasks.

sections.title: Chief Divisional Services
points: CDS supports Trade Processing, Asset Services and Tax Processing through Data Maintenance, Kursinfo, Neutral Control, Investigations, BISO and Policy.
The stream provides security setup, price maintenance, stock/cash reconciliation, investigation of open items, reporting, access governance and policy tracking.

areas.key_activities: WKN generation, new security activation, static data amendments in EE2; deadlines 15-60 minutes.
areas.systems_notes: EE2, Euroclear, WM Daten; 07:00–19:00 CET; 100% German.

areas.key_activities: Updates DB system prices, provides historical prices and daily forex prices to internal departments.
areas.systems_notes: EE2, Bloomberg, Webgateway, Börsenzeitung, WM Daten.

areas.key_activities: Matches stock/cash transactions in Easymatch, flags unclear items and reports open/reconciled balances.
areas.systems_notes: EE2, DB Smart, DMS Report, CARO, RIK, Easymatch.

areas.key_activities: Manual closing, missing transactions, unallocated stock/cash, RAISE, client and status reports.
areas.systems_notes: EE2, TLM, Easymatch, Pilot, JASPER, CARO, CAWFM.

areas.key_activities: Approvals, recertification of profiles/roles and access governance.
Informs owners about organizational changes in frameworks/policies.

sections.title: Auxiliary Activities
sections.module_emphasis: Auxiliary Activities are included as a dedicated section because they enable the primary operations to run smoothly, securely and sustainably.

functions.summary: PAN India initiative for non-German speakers where German language training is provided for A1 level without additional cost. It builds communication capability for Germany-facing processes. Sponsor: Mohammad Rizwan. Lead: Damanpreet Kochhar. Coordinators: Puneet Malhotra and Shaifali Tuli. Locations include Jaipur, Bangalore, Pune and Mumbai.
Designs, delivers and evaluates learning programs to improve skills, knowledge and performance. L&D identifies learning gaps and creates targeted initiatives for employee growth.
Ensures only authorized individuals have required access, manages grants/revocations, monitors access logs and supports entitlement integrity and security protocols.
Manages business assets and arranges assets for new joiners, supporting onboarding, readiness and continuity of operations.
Flagship inclusion program focused on mentorship, skill development, networking, overcoming workplace challenges and positioning women for leadership.

sections.key_takeaway: These functions strengthen language readiness, learning maturity, secure access, onboarding experience, employee engagement and inclusive leadership across DB IS.

compliance_topics.policy_message: Employees and related parties must follow policy and must not assume exclusions.
compliance_topics.employee_action: Read and understand the policy before investing or declaring activities.

compliance_topics.policy_message: Private channels such as WhatsApp, WeChat, Telegram or Facebook Messenger are prohibited for business communication.

compliance_topics.employee_action: More than 30 days delay may result in Red Flag.

compliance_topics.policy_message: DB emails/documents must not be forwarded to personal accounts.
compliance_topics.employee_action: Personal email for home printing is not a valid exception.

compliance_topics.policy_message: Breaches of Red Flag policies, procedures or controls must not be forwarded to the deadline.

final_new_joiner_takeaways.message: DB exists to support clients' lasting success and financial security.
final_new_joiner_takeaways.action: View every task through risk, timeliness and client impact.

final_new_joiner_takeaways.message: IKS, documentation, access reviews, policy adherence and escalation are central.
final_new_joiner_takeaways.action: Do it right, evidence it clearly and escalate early.

final_new_joiner_takeaways.message: Static data, trades, corporate actions, tax, reconciliation and investigations are linked.
German language, system knowledge, securities basics and compliance awareness matter.
Teams work with DBIS, Front Office, Middle Office, custodians, counterparties and internal departments.

combined_final_summary: This combined version brings together the detailed Module 1 foundation and the process-specific decks into one 10-page induction-ready reference. It is suitable as a concise handout for new joiners or a refresher for operations stakeholders.
